options.text: Is the attachment in the correct format?
Can you send me a copy of the email?
What is the purpose of the email?
Can you confirm if the attachment is in .docx format?

content.explanation: 答案解析：正确答案"Is the attachment in the correct format?"是最合适的问题，因为它直接询问抄送人是否正确。其他选项"Can you send me a copy of the email?"是询问邮件副本的请求，"What is the purpose of the email?"询问邮件目的，"Can you confirm if the attachment is in .docx format?"询问附件格式，但不询问抄送人是否正确。
content.scenarioHint: 用户询问抄送人是否正确，服务方/工作人员确认或纠正

options.text: Did I correctly CC Linda and Mark on the update?
Are Linda and Mark the only people who received the update?
What is the correct format for attaching files to the email?
Is the update already sent to Linda and Mark?

content.explanation:
正确答案：Did I correctly CC Linda and Mark on the update？

干扰项所在：
- Are Linda and Mark the only people who received the update？（理解偏差型，误解了场景需求）
- What is the correct format for attaching files to the email？（提问不当型，问题语法正确但不符合该场景）
- Is the update already sent to Linda and Mark？（表达不当型，表达不自然或不完整）
content.scenarioHint: 确认邮件抄送对象和附件格式是否正确

options.text: Perfect—please also CC HR and change the file to PDF.
Thanks! I'll print it out and sign it myself.
Can you send it to my phone instead?
I didn't see the attachment—was it sent?

content.explanation: 正确答案在确认基础上提出合理增补（HR）和格式要求（PDF），体现专业沟通。干扰项2与电子流程冲突，3要求非标准渠道，4质疑发送状态，属于重复确认而非优化反馈。
content.speakerText: I'm sending the contract—CC'd Legal and Finance, and attached the signed version.
content.speakerTextCn: 我正在发送合同，抄送了法务和财务，并附上了签署版。
